0.title: Overview
0.text:
- Build focus: Portal spell build
- Main idea: use Portal to duplicate spell projectiles, reposition, escape bad fights, and create big AoE combos
- Playstyle: set up portals before fights, fall back when surrounded, then send Geyser or Bandido through portals for huge damage
- Strong because it gives mobility, safety, spell duplication, AoE, and summon damage

1.title: Primary Weapon: Sniper
1.text:
- Primary weapon: Long Ranger / Sniper
- Key joker: Focus Shot
- Why Focus Shot: every kill reduces spell cooldowns by 1 second
- This helps you get Portal, Geyser, and especially Bandido back faster
- Best used to pick off enemies safely while your spells and summons control the fight
- Works well because Bandido has a long cooldown, so cooldown reduction from kills is very valuable

2.title: Secondary Weapon: Dual Revolvers
2.text:
- Secondary weapon: Dual Revolvers
- Main purpose: create lightning puddles for spell combos
- Element: Lightning
- Key joker: Swamp Trick
- Why Swamp Trick: lets the revolvers put elemental puddles on the ground
- Lightning puddles can trigger explosions with Acid Geyser
- Also used to power up Bandido into lightning Bandido, making him faster and more dangerous
- Alternative: Bow can work if you do not have the required Dual Revolver setup yet

3.title: Spells
3.text:
- Main spells: Portal, Geyser, and Bandido
- Portal: creates linked portals that players and spell projectiles can pass through
- Portal duplicates spell projectiles, but does not work with bullets or arrows
- Geyser: acid spell used for AoE and lightning explosion combos
- Bandido: summon spell used for extra damage and horde thinning
- Portal + Geyser = duplicated acid geysers for big AoE
- Geyser + Lightning puddles = lightning explosions
- Portal + Bandido = duplicated Bandidos for more summon damage
- Portal can also be thrown into another Portal to detonate and create AoE

4.title: Character
4.text:
- Main character jokers: Glass Cannon, Battle Mage, Disgrace, and Chad
- Glass Cannon gives big damage for killing enemies faster
- Battle Mage reduces ongoing spell cooldowns when killing enemies
- This stacks well with Focus Shot on the Sniper for even more cooldown reduction
- Disgrace gives movement speed and is strong for solo survival
- Chad helps find the Wandering Trader, which is important for solo scaling
- Build wants cooldown reduction because Portal and especially Bandido become much stronger when used often

5.title: Strategy and Run Tips
5.text:
- Cast Portal early so you already have an escape route ready
- When surrounded, cast another Portal, retreat through it, and reset the fight
- Throw Geyser through Portal, then use Dual Revolvers to create lightning puddles and explosions
- Be careful: your own lightning explosions can damage you
- Throw Bandido through Portal to duplicate him and help thin hordes
- Use lightning puddles to turn Bandido into lightning Bandido for more speed and attack pressure
- If Dual Revolvers are out of ammo, throw Portal into Portal to detonate Geyser instead
- Portal can be used like a trampoline by placing portals close together, keeping you airborne and safer from melee enemies
- Save portals for big repositioning moments, like moving from objectives to boss or boss to extraction
- Use the Sniper to pick off enemies and reduce spell cooldowns through Focus Shot
